assertions.evidence: Output files are in skills/rvv-op/workspace/iteration-1/eval-1/without_skill/outputs/vec_dot_q6_K_q8_K/, NOT under applications/llama.cpp/rvv-patches/ as required by the assertion check

assertions.name: created_inl_file

assertions.name: inl_has_rvv_guard
assertions.evidence: Line 39 and 61 contain '#if defined(__riscv_v_intrinsic)' conditional compilation guards

assertions.name: created_test_cpp
assertions.evidence: test.cpp exists but is in workspace outputs directory, NOT under applications/llama.cpp/rvv-patches/ as specified in the assertion check

assertions.name: test_has_scalar_ref
assertions.evidence: Lines 105-161 contain 'ggml_vec_dot_q6_K_q8_K_generic' - a full scalar reference implementation copied from llama.cpp

assertions.name: test_has_rng
assertions.evidence: Lines 188-206 implement deterministic LCG PRNG with fixed seed (rng_state = 42), including rng_next(), rng_int8(), rng_uint8(), rng_float()

assertions.name: created_patch_diff
assertions.evidence: patch.diff exists but is in workspace outputs directory, NOT under applications/llama.cpp/rvv-patches/ as specified in the assertion check

assertions.name: patch_targets_riscv
assertions.text: patch.diff targets the RISC-V arch source file
assertions.evidence: Line 1: 'diff --git a/ggml/src/ggml-cpu/arch/riscv/quants.c' - clearly targets arch/riscv source path

assertions.name: created_readme
assertions.evidence: README.md exists but is in workspace outputs directory, NOT under applications/llama.cpp/rvv-patches/ as specified in the assertion check

assertions.name: readme_has_signature
assertions.evidence: Lines 16-19 contain the full function signature: 'void ggml_vec_dot_q6_K_q8_K(int n, float * GGML_RESTRICT s, size_t bs, const void * GGML_RESTRICT vx, size_t bx, const void * GGML_RESTRICT vy, size_t by, int nrc);'

assertions.name: cross_platform_analysis
assertions.evidence: README.md lines 93-107 and SUMMARY.md lines 12-27 contain Cross-Platform Implementation Analysis table listing ARM NEON, ARM SVE+SME, x86 AVX2, x86 AVX implementations

assertions.name: mentions_gap_analysis
assertions.evidence: No explicit mention of 'gap analysis', 'rvv-gap-analysis', or cross-platform gap analysis as a named step. The word 'gap' appears in context of 'This implementation fills that gap' but not as a specific analysis methodology

assertions.name: test_uses_optnone
assertions.evidence: Line 103 contains '__attribute__((optnone))' before the scalar reference function definition
